JScience 1.0.0-SNAPSHOT
  1. org.jscience.core.util.identity
  2. Identification

Uses of Class
org.jscience.core.util.identity.Identification

Packages that use Identification
Package
Description
org.jscience.core.bibliography
 
org.jscience.core.methodology
Core functionality for the org.jscience.core.methodology package in the JScience library.
org.jscience.core.util.identity
 
org.jscience.natural.biology
 
org.jscience.natural.biology.cell
 
org.jscience.natural.biology.ecology
 
org.jscience.natural.biology.evolution
 
org.jscience.natural.biology.neuroscience
 
org.jscience.natural.biology.taxonomy
 
org.jscience.natural.chemistry
 
org.jscience.natural.chemistry.spectroscopy
 
org.jscience.natural.earth
 
org.jscience.natural.medicine
Provides the org.jscience.social.medicine module.
org.jscience.natural.methodology.experiment
Core functionality for the org.jscience.core.methodology.experiment package in the JScience library.
org.jscience.natural.physics
Covers:
org.jscience.natural.physics.astronomy
 
org.jscience.social.arts
- artworks, music, literature classification.
org.jscience.social.arts.music
- musical notes, instruments, compositions.
org.jscience.social.economics
Provides comprehensive mathematical models for economic systems, agent-based modeling, and financial analysis.
org.jscience.social.economics.models
 
org.jscience.social.economics.money
Provides classes for monetary and financial operations.
org.jscience.social.economics.resources
Provides classes and interfaces for representing economic resources.
org.jscience.social.history
- historical events, timelines, and chronology.
org.jscience.social.history.archeology
Provides classes and interfaces for archaeological research and analysis.
org.jscience.social.law
Provides the org.jscience.social.law module.
org.jscience.social.linguistics.loaders.tigerxml
Standard TigerXML loader for linguistic corpora.
org.jscience.social.philosophy
Provides support for philosophy, including formal logic, ethics, epistemology, and storytelling.
org.jscience.social.philosophy.epistemology
Provides classes for modeling epistemology, the study of knowledge and justified belief.
org.jscience.social.philosophy.storytelling
Provides the org.jscience.social.philosophy.storytelling module.
org.jscience.social.politics
Provides the org.jscience.social.politics module.
org.jscience.social.psychology.social
Provides the org.jscience.social.psychology.social module.
org.jscience.social.sociology
- social structures, persons, and cultural modeling.
org.jscience.social.sociology.survey
Core functionality for the org.jscience.social.sociology.survey package in the JScience library.
org.jscience.social.sports
Provides classes and interfaces for sports science, athletic performance analysis, and competition modeling.

    Classes in org.jscience.core.bibliography that implement interfaces with type arguments of type Identification
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final record 
    BibliographicalNotice
    Represents a detailed bibliographical notice for a work (book, article, etc.).

    Method
    Description

    Description

    Creates an instance of a BibliographicalNotice record class.

  • Uses of Identification in org.jscience.core.util.identity

    Classes in org.jscience.core.util.identity with type parameters of type Identification
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    Identified<T extends Identification>
    Represents an entity that can be uniquely identified.
    Subclasses of Identification in org.jscience.core.util.identity
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    DOIIdentification
    Digital Object Identifier (DOI) identification.
    class 
    ISBNIdentification
    International Standard Book Number (ISBN) identification.
    class 
    SimpleIdentification
    A simple string-based identification.
    class 
    SSNIdentification
    Social Security Number (SSN) identification.
    class 
    UUIDIdentification
    Universally Unique Identifier (UUID) identification.
    Subinterfaces with type arguments of type Identification in org.jscience.core.util.identity
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    ComprehensiveIdentification
    An encompassing interface that groups identification, naming, commenting, and serialization.
    Classes in org.jscience.core.util.identity that implement interfaces with type arguments of type Identification
    Modifier and Type

    class 
    Identification

  • Uses of Identification in org.jscience.natural.methodology.experiment

    Classes in org.jscience.natural.methodology.experiment that implement interfaces with type arguments of type Identification
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Subject
    A class representing an animal or human subject that takes part in an experiment.
    class 
    Task
    An abstract representation of a specific task within an experimental study.
    class 
    Trial
    Represents a single execution or measurement event within an experimental task.
    class 
    Variable
    Represents a measurable or manipulable variable in a scientific experiment.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static Coin
    Coin.euro(Identification id, TimeCoordinate emission, double value)
    Creates a Euro coin.
    static Coin
    Coin.usPenny(Identification id, TimeCoordinate emission)
    Creates a US penny.
    static Coin
    Coin.usQuarter(Identification id, TimeCoordinate emission)
    Creates a US quarter.
    Constructors in org.jscience.social.economics.money with parameters of type Identification
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    Account(Bank bank, Set<EconomicAgent> owners, Identification identification, String name, Money amount)
    Creates a new Account with full details.
     
    Account(Bank bank, Set<EconomicAgent> owners, Identification id, String name, Money amount, Map<Share,Integer> shares)
    Creates a new Account with shares.
     
    Check(Identification identification, Account emitter, Organization receiver, TimeCoordinate emission, double amount, Currency currency)
    Creates a new Check from amount and currency.
     
    Check(Identification id, Account emitter, Organization receiver, TimeCoordinate emission, Money value)
    Creates a new Check.
     
    Coin(double value, Identification identification, TimeCoordinate emission, Currency currency)
    Creates a new Coin from amount and currency.
     
    Coin(Identification identification, TimeCoordinate emission, Money value)
    Creates a new Coin.
     
    Coin(Identification id, TimeCoordinate emission, Money value, String mintMark)
    Creates a new Coin with mint mark.
     
    Receipt(Organization seller, Organization buyer, TimeCoordinate date, Identification id, String description, Money amount)
    Creates a receipt for a money transaction.
     
    Receipt(Organization seller, Organization buyer, TimeCoordinate date, Identification id, String description, Share share, int quantity)
    Creates a receipt for a share transaction.
     
    Transaction(Organization seller, Organization buyer, TimeCoordinate date, Identification id, String description, Money amount)
    Creates a money transaction.
     
    Transaction(Organization seller, Organization buyer, TimeCoordinate date, Identification id, String description, Share share, int quantity)
    Creates a share transaction.

    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    Act(Identification id, ActKind kind, TimeCoordinate date, String object, Set<Human> subjects)
    Creates a new Act object.
     
    LawSuitSituation(String name, String comments, Identification identification)
    Creates a new LawSuitSituation with specific name, comments, and identification.
     
    LawSuitSituation(Identification identification)
    Creates a new LawSuitSituation with a specific identification.
     
    License(EconomicAgent owner, Organization authority, Identification identification, String right)
    Creates a new License object with a single initial right.
     
    License(EconomicAgent owner, Organization authority, Identification identification, List<String> rights)
    Creates a new License object with multiple rights.
